provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall reptilian alien Veshan with extremely rare pale white scales instead of the normal dark green-grey, amber eyes that are almost golden, a prominent crest ridge bearing the marks of a full warrior, other warriors stare but the armor is earned and that settles any question, wearing standard dark bronze forged plate that looks even more striking against the white scales, crimson sash, the usual house markings, the unusualness is biological not cultural — every piece of gear is standard issue
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
